economic_notes: First Nation holds 25% of Lower Mattagami Energy Limited Partnership (6 hydro-electric generating stations). Owns Moose Cree Group of Companies LP, Moose Cree Constructors Inc., and other business enterprises. Receives distributions from Lower Mattagami LP of $14,050,776 and Moose Cree Constructors of $1,082,709. Has interest in Kimesskanemenow Limited Partnership for winter road construction and maintenance.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Moose Cree Education Authority, Amisk-OO-Skow Finance Corporation, Moose Cree Training and Employment Unit Inc. Four GBEs on modified equity basis: Moose Cree Group of Companies LP, Moose Cree Group GP Ltd, 1929319 Ontario Inc., and Moose Cree Constructors Inc. Portfolio investments of $140,908,262 represent investment in Lower Mattagami Limited Partnership at cost (not equity method). Total government transfers calculated as ISC $29,391,955 + CMHC $841,860 + Federal other $201,007 + Province of Ontario $8,047,997 + OFNLP $2,438,639 = $40,921,458; however OFNLP may not be a government transfer so conservatively included. OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers. No schedule of remuneration included in the document. Revenue lines shown are actuals from 2022 column; prior year revenue lines used for revenue_lines as the statement shows 2022 actuals. Segment expense for housing shows $1,476,408 (slightly different from statement line of $1,478,143 due to segment rounding). Large London Life loan of $43.6M secured by LMLP investment. Funds held in trust with Government of Canada: $30,640.
